RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0017 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Priya Dubois Date of Birth: 21/06/1980 SSN (tokenized): TKN-465656 Annual Income: $117,000 Employer: Acme Logistics Loan Amount: $56,000 Term (months): 60 Branch: Berlin Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN56740AL Hyundai F-150 2018 EV Used 55,000 Authorized Signature: Priya Dubois
